carouselSection.title: Latest Insights & Resources
carouselSection.text: Swipe through our latest articles and resources to help you support your mental health journey.

items.title: Understanding Cognitive Behavioral Therapy
items.text: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) is an effective treatment for a wide range of mental health issues, including depression and anxiety.

items.title: The Importance of Self-Care
items.text: Taking time for self-care is crucial for maintaining mental and emotional well-being. It can be as simple as a 10-minute daily meditation.

items.title: Navigating Relationship Anxiety
items.text: Learn effective strategies to communicate better and address relationship anxiety with your partner.

items.title: Mindfulness in Daily Life
items.text: Mindfulness helps us to remain present. Discover how implementing small mental exercises can reduce overall stress.

items.title: Building Resilience
items.text: Life is full of challenges, but building resilience can help you bounce back stronger after adversity.

items.title: Sleep Hygiene and Mental Health
items.text: Adequate sleep is fundamental to cognitive function and emotional regulation. Here are tips to improve your sleep.
